    Method
    Description
    protected TermLabelManager.RefactoringsContainer
    TermLabelManager.computeRefactorings(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm)
    Computes the TermLabelRefactoring to consider.
    static ImmutableArray<TermLabel>
    TermLabelManager.instantiateLabels(TermLabelState state, Services services, JTerm applicationTerm, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Rule rule, RuleApp ruleApp, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm)
    Computes the TermLabel to add to a new JTerm while a Rule is currently active.
    ImmutableArray<TermLabel>
    TermLabelManager.instantiateLabels(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, RuleApp ruleApp, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm)
    Computes the TermLabel to add to a new JTerm while a Rule is currently active.
    static ImmutableArray<TermLabel>
    TermLabelManager.instantiateLabels(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Rule rule, RuleApp ruleApp, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm)
    Computes the TermLabel to add to a new JTerm while a Rule is currently active.
    static JTerm
    TermLabelManager.label(Services services, TermLabelState state, JTerm applicationTerm, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Rule rule, RuleApp ruleApp, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm)
    Computes the TermLabels for the new JTerm via TermLabelManager.instantiateLabels(TermLabelState, Services, PosInOccurrence, JTerm, Rule, RuleApp, Goal, Object, JTerm, JTerm) and refactors the labels below the new JTerm in addition via TermLabelManager.refactorTerm(TermLabelState, Services, PosInOccurrence, JTerm, Goal, Object, Rule, JTerm).
    static JTerm
    TermLabelManager.label(Services services, TermLabelState state, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Rule rule, RuleApp ruleApp, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm)
    Computes the TermLabels for the new JTerm via TermLabelManager.instantiateLabels(TermLabelState, Services, PosInOccurrence, JTerm, Rule, RuleApp, Goal, Object, JTerm, JTerm) and refactors the labels below the new JTerm in addition via TermLabelManager.refactorTerm(TermLabelState, Services, PosInOccurrence, JTerm, Goal, Object, Rule, JTerm).
    JTerm
    TermLabelManager.label(TermLabelState state, Services services, JTerm applicationTerm, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Rule rule, RuleApp ruleApp, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm)
    Computes the TermLabels for the new JTerm via TermLabelManager.instantiateLabels(TermLabelState, Services, PosInOccurrence, JTerm, Rule, RuleApp, Goal, Object, JTerm, JTerm) and refactors the labels below the new JTerm in addition via TermLabelManager.refactorTerm(TermLabelState, Services, PosInOccurrence, JTerm, Goal, Object, Rule, JTerm).
    protected ImmutableArray<TermLabel>
    TermLabelManager.performRefactoring(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm term, Set<TermLabelRefactoring> activeRefactorings)
    Computes the new labels as part of the refactoring for the given JTerm.
    protected void
    TermLabelManager.performTermLabelPolicies(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm, Map<Name, TermLabelPolicy> policies, Set<TermLabel> newLabels)
    Performs the given TermLabelPolicy instances.
    protected void
    TermLabelManager.performTermLabelPolicies(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm, Map<Name, TermLabelPolicy> policies, Set<TermLabel> newLabels, TermLabel label)
    Performs the given TermLabelPolicy instances.
    protected void
    TermLabelManager.performUpdater(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, JTerm modalityTerm, Rule rule, RuleApp ruleApp, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm, ImmutableList<TermLabelUpdate> updater, Set<TermLabel> newLabels)
    Performs the given child and grandchild TermLabelUpdate instances.
    protected JTerm
    TermLabelManager.refactorApplicationTerm(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, TermLabelManager.RefactoringsContainer refactorings, TermFactory tf)
    Refactors the labels of the application term.
    void

    Refactors all labels in the complete Sequent.
    static void
    TermLabelManager.refactorGoal(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm)
    Refactors all labels in the complete Sequent.
    protected JTerm

    Refactors all labels in the complete Sequent.

    Refactors all labels in the complete Sequent.
